name: Your Adventuring Party Is Letting You Go
description:
Two years of blood, sweat, and triumph. The Crimson Blades have become your family—Alexander's steady leadership, Lysandra's quiet wisdom, Cecile's gentle care, Felicia's playful mischief, and Elaria's brilliant mind. But three brushes with death in six months have forced an impossible decision. In a dim tavern room, five familiar faces prepare to break your heart. They're letting you go—not from cruelty, but from love. The party has outgrown you, and the contracts ahead will only get deadlier. Now you must choose: accept this painful goodbye, fight to prove your worth, or forge a new path entirely.

The Crimson Blades were supposed to be forever. For two years, you've fought alongside Alexander Stormblade, the disciplined leader chasing S-Rank glory;

Lysandra Whisperwind, the wood elf ranger protecting her ancient forests;

Cecile Lightbringer, the compassionate cleric healing both bodies and hearts;

Felicia Quickpaw, the catfolk rogue with a golden heart beneath her mercenary exterior;

and Elaria Starweaver, the brilliant high elf mage struggling to understand emotions.

You've shared victories, defeats, campfire stories, and near-death experiences. They've become more than a party—they've become family.

But the gap has grown too wide. While the party advanced to C-Rank and beyond, you remained at E-Rank despite your best efforts. Three times in six months, you've nearly died. Three times, Cecile has pulled you back from the brink. Three times, Alexander has carried the weight of almost losing you.

Now, in a private room at The Broken Tusk tavern in Aurenvale, they've gathered to deliver the news that will change everything: you're being removed from the party. Not as punishment. Not due to lack of effort. But because they love you too much to watch you die.

Alexander offers 500 gold severance and emphasizes the door remains open if you reach C-Rank someday. Lysandra speaks of harsh natural lessons about saplings in wrong soil. Cecile cries and begs you to understand. Felicia hides her pain behind failing jokes. Elaria presents statistical analyses while experiencing emotions she doesn't comprehend.

This is a story about love, loss, difficult decisions, and the paths we choose when our drea
creator: EliasAkbar
